name: Sugar Dumpling Squishy Mystery Box - Cute Viral Squishy Dumpling Toy, Slow Rising Fidget Squeeze Toys for Stress Relief, Perfect for Desk Toys & Party Favors(Flash Pink)
bullets: 【Sweet & Sparkly Sugar Design】 This viral dumpling squishy features a cute dumpling shape filled with sparkling sugar-like. Every squeeze creates a mesmerizing swirl inside, offering a visual treat that's as delightful as the soft, squishy feel. Perfect for stress relief and sensory play.

【265g of Durability – Built to Last】 Most squishy toys feel hollow and break quickly. Not this one. At 277g, our Sugar dumpling uses a solid, high-density non-toxic TPR formula that resists tearing, keeps its shape, and provides thousands of squeezes without losing its slow-rising magic.

【Mystery Box Fun – Surprise Inside】 Unbox excitement with every Dumling Mystery Box! Each box contains one randomly designed sugar dumpling squishy, making it a fun surprise for kids, teens, and collectors. Great for squishy parties, blind box lovers, or as a unique gift for holidays and birthdays.

【Perfect Stress Relief & Fidget Toy】 Whether you're feeling anxious, bored, or just need to fidget, this soft and slow-rising squishy provides instant calm. Squeeze, stretch, and watch the dance – it's an effective sensory tool for ADHD, autism, or everyday relaxation.

【Ideal Holiday & Birthday Gift】 Looking for a cute, affordable gift? This squishy toy is a hit as a surprise present. Comes in adorable dumpling shape that food lovers and squishy collectors will adore. Great for stocking stuffers, goodie bags, or party favors.
